name: Stickman Gun Runner
description: Stickman Gun Runner is an action-packed RPG runner shooter game that combines fast-paced gun shooting, intense stickman fighting, and nonstop adventure. Step into a dark and dangerous world where you control a fearless stickman warrior running forward while shooting zombies, monsters, and powerful enemies. Upgrade your weapons, unlock new guns, master special skills, and customize your stickman with cool skins as you progress through challenging levels. Each run tests your reflexes, aiming accuracy, and combat strategy. Face deadly bosses, dodge obstacles, and survive waves of enemies in this thrilling action shooter game.
